gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/257)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/257)
text: إِنَّهُ لَمَّا احْتُضِرَ أَبِي ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ لِي يَا بُنَيَّ إِنَّهُ لَا يَنَالُ شَفَاعَتَنَا مَنِ اسْتَخَفَّ بِالصَّلَاةِ وَ لَا يَرِدُ عَلَيْنَا الْحَوْضَ مَنْ أَدْمَنَ هَذِهِ الْأَشْرِبَةَ فَقُلْتُ يَا أَبَهْ وَ أَيَّ الْأَشْرِبَةِ فَقَالَ كُلَّ مُسْكِرٍ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Ibn Muskan, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When my<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> was about to pass away, he<sup>asws</sup> said to me<sup>asws</sup>: ‘O my<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup>! He would not attain our<sup>asws</sup> intercession, the one who holds the Prayer in light estimation, nor would he return to us<sup>asws</sup> at the Fountain, the one who is habitual in these drinks’. So I<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘O father<sup>asws</sup>! And which drinks?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Every intoxicant’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il from ibn Muskan from abu Basir who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When my father was about to pass away he said to me, ‘My son, our intercession will not apply to those who take their Salat (prayer) lightly and the addicts of these drinks will not be able to come to us at the pond. I then asked, ‘What are these drinks, O father?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It is all intoxicating liquor.’”
